name: Easy Death by Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the fudge brownie mix according to directions.
2. While the brownies are baking, mix together the chocolate syrup and Kahlua in a small bowl.
3. Pour about half of the chocolate syrup mixture into a serving dish.
4. When the brownies are done and cooled, break them up and add them to the serving dish on top of the syrup mixture.
5. Mix the remaining chocolate syrup with the Chocolate mousse according to package directions.
6. Spread the mousse mixture evenly over the cake.
7. Spread the Cool whip evenly over the mousse.
8. Drizzle the remaining chocolate syrup over the cool whip or serve it drizzled on top of each serving.
9. Break up the Heath bars (or Skor candies) and sprinkle them between layers before serving.
